base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of x — a character (boss) from 1993 mega man x. X — base + Helmet + Body + Arm + Leg armor upgrades × pose-set. Dash + wall-jump + charge-shot + Hadouken (secret). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: X — base + Helmet + Body + Arm + Leg armor upgrades × pose-set. Dash + wall-jump + charge-shot + Hadouken (secret)
